request: You are Reviewer R1: user intent and completion-bar reviewer for DinoBrain. Work read-only. Inspect the real workspace and memory, not just this prompt. Minimum required files: <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> <machine-local-path> and relevant DinoBrain docs found by rg. User's requirement: DinoBrain must become a closed-loop OS where every Codex/Claude session gets pre-response OS context, uses reviewed LLM Wiki memory/provenance, writes finish traces, grows knowledge, and policy-pushes to GitHub; current user instruction always outranks memory. Decide whether the plan document has concrete completion conditions matching that user intent. Return a concise structured result with reviewer_id=R1, verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED, blocking_objections[], required_doc_changes[], evidence_files[]. If REVISE_REQUIRED, be specific enough to patch the document.

gates.reason: The request or hook input was marked sensitive.
gates.safe_action: Do not store secrets or raw full transcripts; keep sync blocked until review.

gates.reason: Every started OS task must be closed with finish_task.
gates.safe_action: Keep the task visible as active/pending until finish_task writes a trace.
